description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of Dri-Fit 100% recycled polyester, with white ribbed crew neck, white short sleeves with red cuffs, perforated stripe design on the body, appliqued club badge on the left chest, embroidered swoosh logo on the right chest, sponsor logo on the front and club name at center back neck FitRegular  Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Play with honor in the Arsenal football Club home men's Soccer shirt, a lightweight, short-sleeve jersey designed for maximum performance. The bold jersey design with the team badge is inspired by the successful achievements of the team. The Dri-FIT performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact.
